title: Darcy Umbilical
subtitle: Protected vehicle-side interface for ground power, Ethernet, ESTOP, and hardware safing
stackup: Four copper-layer vehicle-side umbilical PCB exported from Altium Gerbers
summary: A compact four-layer vehicle-side umbilical PCB connecting launch and ground-support equipment to the Darcy avionics system. The board carries power, Ethernet, ESTOP, and RBF/safing signals across a mechanically constrained connector boundary while incorporating transient protection and keyed interfaces to reduce wiring and operator errors.
mainConstraints: Keep every vehicle-to-ground signal easy to trace and audit
Protect externally handled interfaces against ESD and transient events
Preserve Ethernet impedance and reference continuity through the connector boundary
Separate power and high-energy paths from communication and safing signals
Use connector keying, polarity, and labeling to reduce integration mistakes
publicNote: This project is derived from exported Altium schematic and Gerber artifacts. Raw .SchDoc and .PcbDoc files are not parsed by this portfolio.
